eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Jackson, OR; at 7:01 PM on JUL 18, 2026 Effective until 11:01 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Wildfire Alert - Jackson County Sheriff's Office has issued a Level 1 BE READY to evacuate for JAC-203-A near of Antioch and Jones Rd, Sams Valley due to Evans Creek Rd. Monitor local news sources for evacuation and incident information.
